precepts of a man so he's asking what is the object of uh making the mokka all these 227 precepts for the monks and the buddha said it was done with 10 objects in view bali what then for the excellence of the sangha there is the bhikkhu sangha amongst order for the well-being of the sangha for the control of ill-conditioned mounts and the comfort of well-behaved mounts for the restraint of the asavas in this same visible state of life for protection against the asavas in the future lifetime to give confidence to those with little confidence to give more confidence to those with confidence to establish true dhamma and to support the vinaya monastic discipline these upali are the 10 objects in view of which the training was enjoined or imposed on the tata gathers disciples and the patamoka pronouns so uh stop here for a moment so basically uh it was for the well-being of the sangha and for the control of the badly behaved monks and for the psas restraint of the asavas asavas refers to the uncontrolled mental outflows our mind tends to flow and this gives us a lot of suffering and this flowing is 1 normally we say like stray thoughts in chinese we think of this we think of that the mind is always leaking and this tendency of this ah to flow is so strong that every night when we go to sleep we dream we dream is still the mind flowing so when we meditate it is ultimately to stop the mind from flowing because when the mind flows it is consciousness flowing also ultimately this consciousness flowing and it is consciousness that creates the whole world so if we stop the mind from flowing by meditating and making the mind mind 1 pointed and the mind becomes 1 pointed and it does not flow to fix your mind on 1 object it does not flow then slowly you are able to make it stop flowing and then when the mind stops flowing completely a person [Music] so for the restraint of the asavas of protection against us in a future lifetime to give confidence to those with little confidence to give more confidence to those with confidence to establish the true dharma and the video and then the verbal upali asked again praise sir what is the nature of the suspension of the patimoka and the buddha said the suspension of the patimoka upali is of 10 shorts what 10 when a transgressor or paradigm is seated in that company when debate about the transgressor is unfinished and a person not fully ordained is seated in that company when debate about such a 1 is unfinished and 1 who has renounced the training is seated in that company when debate on that subject is finished when a young or you know means a frustrated person is seated in that company when debate about such a 1 is unfinished and 1 who has seduced and none is seated in that company when debate about such a 1 is unfinished these are the 10 suspensions of the patimoka that's the end of the suta
